creator: saper@saper.info
text:
FreeBSD radziecki.saper.info 11.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT #4: Sat Sep 13 13:12:37 CEST 2014     root@radziecki.saper.info:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/VAIO  amd64

SHA256 (/usr/cache/pkg/qemu-devel-2.3.0_2-ca2bfe149e.txz) = ca2bfe149e4be610a228a2308d47c0db893c97c6e2019e8cd5954af907b0c240


After launching qemu-system-i386 briefly flashes sdl window and exists with

/usr/local/bin/qemu-system-i386: Undefined symbol "ppoll"

The same for other architectures I tried (-sparc, -sparc64).

Adding -monitor on stdio switches terminal to a hardly usable state ("> " prompt after every key, no real output).
